company.name: Lumenx
company.description: Lumenx builds focused micro-software for small and mid-sized teams. Every product does one thing, integrates with the others, and is priced so a single person can adopt it without filing a budget request.

startup_program.name: Lumenx Liftoff
startup_program.eligibility: Companies under 2 years old with under USD 1M in funding.

education_program.name: Lumenx Campus
education_program.eligibility: Verified students, teachers, and registered non-profits.

bundle.name: Lumenx Suite
bundle.description: Any 5 Lumenx products on the Pro plan billed together.

products.name: EmailPilot
products.tagline: AI drafting for your inbox.
products.description: EmailPilot watches your inbox and drafts replies that sound like you. It learns your tone from past sent messages and pulls context from attached files. You stay in control: every reply lands as a draft until you hit send.
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime. Plan remains active until the end of the current billing period.
products.refund: Full refund within 14 days of first purchase.
products.target_audience: Founders, consultants, and customer-facing roles drowning in email.

products.name: InvoiceFlow
products.tagline: Invoices that get paid faster.
products.description: InvoiceFlow turns a one-line description into a polished invoice in seconds. Automatic reminders go out on day 3, 7, and 14 after due date. Payments arrive directly into your bank through Stripe or Razorpay.
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime. Your data is exportable as CSV for 30 days after cancellation.
products.refund: Pro-rated refund within 14 days of first purchase.
products.target_audience: Freelancers, agencies, and small service businesses.

products.name: TaskGrid
products.tagline: Spreadsheet-fast task tracking.
products.description: TaskGrid is a task tracker that feels like a spreadsheet but behaves like a project tool. Group, filter, and pivot tasks by anyone, due date, or custom tag. Built for teams that find Jira too heavy and a checklist too thin.
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime. Free plan stays available forever for solo workspaces.
products.refund: Refund within 14 days for paid plans.
products.target_audience: Small ops teams, founders, and operations leads.

products.name: FormCraft
products.tagline: Forms that don't feel like forms.
products.description: FormCraft helps you build conversational forms that double completion rates. Logic jumps, hidden fields, and partial response capture come standard. Submissions land in a clean dashboard or any webhook you point at.
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime. Free plan stays active.
products.refund: Refund within 14 days of first paid purchase.
products.target_audience: Marketers, researchers, and customer success teams.

products.name: CalendarSync
products.tagline: Booking links that respect your day.
products.description: CalendarSync gives every teammate a polished booking link with built-in buffer time and meeting caps. Connect Google or Microsoft calendars and let attendees pick from real free slots. Round-robin and collective scheduling are built in.
features: Daily meeting cap and buffer time
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime.
products.target_audience: Sales, recruiting, and any role that lives in meetings.

products.name: NoteHub
products.tagline: Notes you can actually find later.
products.description: NoteHub is a markdown-first notes app with backlinks and a graph view. Pages cross-reference automatically as you type. Search runs locally so it stays fast even with 10,000 notes.
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime. Notes remain readable offline forever.
products.target_audience: Researchers, writers, and engineering teams.

products.name: ChatRelay
products.tagline: Customer chat that doesn't need a war room.
products.description: ChatRelay is a website chat widget and inbox for small teams. Route by topic, set business hours, and auto-reply when nobody is online. Connect to email, WhatsApp, and Slack so no message slips through.
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime. Inbox history exports as JSON.
products.target_audience: Small support teams, e-commerce shops, SaaS startups.

products.name: SignPath
products.tagline: E-signatures without the per-document tax.
products.description: SignPath collects legally valid e-signatures with a flat monthly fee. Drag fields onto a PDF, pick signers, and track who has opened, viewed, and signed. Audit trail is included by default.
features: Audit trail with IP and timestamp
Bulk send to up to 200 recipients
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime. Signed PDFs are yours and downloadable forever.
products.refund: 14 day refund window for first purchase.
products.target_audience: Sales ops, HR, and legal in small companies.

products.name: PollWise
products.tagline: Run a poll in under a minute.
products.description: PollWise is a focused tool for short surveys and quick polls. Distribute by link, email, or QR code. Get instant cross-tabs and CSV exports without spreadsheet wrangling.
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime.
products.target_audience: Product, marketing, and research teams.

products.name: ReceiptVault
products.tagline: Snap, store, and reclaim every receipt.
products.description: ReceiptVault turns paper receipts and email confirmations into searchable expense records. OCR extracts merchant, amount, currency, and tax in seconds. Sync to your accounting tool or export a tidy CSV at month end.
features: OCR with currency and tax extraction
Sync to QuickBooks and Zoho Books
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime. Data exports as CSV and PDFs.
products.target_audience: Founders, traveling professionals, and finance ops.

products.name: TimeMark
products.tagline: Time tracking that doesn't nag.
products.description: TimeMark is a quiet time tracker for individuals and small teams. Auto-detects what you are working on and groups it by project at the end of the day. One-click invoices feed into InvoiceFlow.
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime.
products.target_audience: Freelancers and small agencies.

products.name: DocuMerge
products.tagline: PDFs you don't have to fight.
products.description: DocuMerge merges, splits, compresses, and signs PDFs from one clean interface. Drag in 100 files, get one tidy PDF. Built on a local engine so your documents never leave your browser unless you ask.
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime.
products.target_audience: Anyone who works with PDFs more than once a week.

products.name: KanbanLite
products.tagline: A kanban board, nothing more.
products.description: KanbanLite is a fast, no-frills board for visual task flow. Columns, cards, and a single label per card. Made for teams that want kanban without ten plugins.
features: Single label per card by design
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime.
products.target_audience: Engineering and design teams.

products.name: MeetMinutes
products.tagline: Meeting notes that actually capture decisions.
products.description: MeetMinutes joins your Zoom, Meet, or Teams call and writes structured notes. Decisions, action items, and open questions land in your inbox five minutes after the call ends. Full transcript stays searchable.
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime. Transcripts remain downloadable for 90 days after.
products.target_audience: Product, sales, and leadership teams.

products.name: PixelDeck
products.tagline: Slides built in markdown, exported as pixels.
products.description: PixelDeck is for engineers and educators who want polished decks without dragging text boxes. Write in markdown, get a deck that looks designed. Export as PDF, PPTX, or a hosted URL.
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime.
products.target_audience: Engineers, educators, and technical founders.

products.name: InboxClean
products.tagline: Triage your inbox in three minutes a day.
products.description: InboxClean groups your inbox into Now, Later, and Forever-Maybe. Bulk unsubscribe with one tap. Promotions and receipts get auto-filed using ReceiptVault rules.
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime. We never touch your messages on the server after cancellation.
products.target_audience: Executives, founders, and consultants.

products.name: TeamPulse
products.tagline: Lightweight pulse surveys for real teams.
products.description: TeamPulse runs short, recurring surveys that take 90 seconds to answer. Trends show up over weeks, not after a yearly engagement push. Anonymous by default and aggregated above a five-person floor.
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime. Aggregated history exports as CSV.
products.target_audience: People ops and engineering managers.

products.name: LinkVault
products.tagline: Shared bookmarks that don't go stale.
products.description: LinkVault is a shared bookmark manager for teams. Saved links get auto-tagged and re-checked weekly so dead URLs surface fast. Searchable from a browser extension or a Slack slash command.
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime.
products.target_audience: Research, design, and engineering teams.

products.name: BillSplit
products.tagline: Stripe-style subscription billing in a weekend.
products.description: BillSplit gives small SaaS companies the subscription, dunning, and invoicing flow that usually takes a quarter to build. Hosted checkout, customer portal, and webhook events are all included. Switch on tax handling per country with one toggle.
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime. Your customer and invoice data exports as a single ZIP.
products.refund: 14 day refund window for first purchase.
products.target_audience: Indie SaaS founders and small SaaS companies.

products.name: AuditTrail
products.tagline: Compliance logging without the consulting bill.
products.description: AuditTrail records who did what, where, and when across your stack. SOC 2 and ISO 27001 evidence packs are generated on demand. Drop in one SDK and your logs become audit-ready.
products.cancellation: Cancel anytime. Logs remain readable for 30 days post-cancellation.
products.refund: 14 day refund window for first purchase.
products.target_audience: Engineering and security teams in regulated industries.
